config.title: Kreator przydziału towaru #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'msgbox #include "50122" #include "50518"
'harui #include "50101"
'fire_choicelist #include "50200"
dim g_eMode dim g_pRRAT : set g_pRRAT = nothing dim g_pModPM : set g_pModPM = doc_.getmodule(60227)
dim g_idMagRezerw : g_idMagRezerw = clng(0)
#ifdef _ABAKUS dim g_bPressPrzydziel: g_bPressPrzydziel = false #endif
function fopen : fopen = false g_eMode = trans_.var(APPVAR_MODE)
if not HARUI(UAR_CMDID(CMDID_WIZZARD_REAL_ZAM)) then exit function end if
g_idMagRezerw = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN,"eTyp = N5TYPMAG_REZERWACJE")
'todo: harui
fopen = frefresh() end function
function frefresh : frefresh = false
dim pModRapEngine : set pModRapEngine = doc_.getmodule(60108)
dim pRRAT : set pRRAT = g_pModPM.new_resource_request_alloc_tool()
pRRAT.init g_idMagRezerw
dim pParamArray : set pParamArray = get_default_param(pRRAT)
if pModRapEngine.show_raport_param_dialog(pParamArray,"Kryteria selekcji") = 0 then exit function end if
dim pPerforming : set pPerforming = doc_.performing("Trwa przygotowanie danych...")
set g_pRRAT = nothing trans_.discard set g_pRRAT = pRRAT
fill_results g_pRRAT,pParamArray frefresh = true end function
function fsave 'todo ' fsave = std_fsave() end function
function get_default_param(byref pRRAT) dim pParamArray : set pParamArray = doc_.afc.new_navoarray()
pParamArray.add pRRAT.get_termin_real_param() pParamArray.add pRRAT.get_rejestr_param() pParamArray.add pRRAT.get_magazyn_param() pParamArray.add pRRAT.get_klient_nazwa_param() pParamArray.add pRRAT.get_klient_indeks_param() pParamArray.add pRRAT.get_grupa_klient_param()
set get_default_param = pParamArray end function
function section_hideshow_hli(byref pHLI) doc_.afc.formsection.section_hideshow page_, pHLI.prop(100) end function
'---------------------------------------------------- function all_allocate_products() #ifdef _ABAKUS g_bPressPrzydziel = true #endif g_pRRAT.allocate_qty end function
function order_allocate_products(byref pHLI) #ifdef _ABAKUS g_bPressPrzydziel = true #endif dim nIter : nIter = clng(pHLI.prop(100))
g_pRRAT.allocate_qty_item nIter end function
function all_release_products() #ifdef _ABAKUS g_bPressPrzydziel = false #endif g_pRRAT.release_qty end function
function order_release_products(byref pHLI) #ifdef _ABAKUS g_bPressPrzydziel = false #endif dim nIter : nIter = clng(pHLI.prop(100))
g_pRRAT.release_qty_item nIter end function
function c##CTRLID_ALLOC_QTY##_ongetdata(pCtrl) dim nIter : nIter = clng(pCtrl.userprop.prop(100)) dim nIter2 : nIter2 = clng(pCtrl.userprop.prop(101))
dim oRRI : set oRRI = g_pRRAT.m_oItemArray.Value(nIter) dim oRRID : set oRRID = oRRI.m_oDetailArray.Value(nIter2)
pCtrl.value = oRRID.m_curAllocQty
dim bWykresl: bWykresl = (oRRID.m_curAllocQty <> 0) #ifdef _ABAKUS if g_bPressPrzydziel then dim curIloscDost : curIloscDost = ccur(pCtrl.userprop.prop(103)) bWykresl = not (curIloscDost < oRRID.m_curPendingQty) end if #endif
wykresl_wiersz pCtrl.parent.parent,bWykresl end function
function c##CTRLID_ALLOC_QTY##_ondataentered(pCtrl, varValue) dim nIter : nIter = clng(pCtrl.userprop.prop(100)) dim nIter2 : nIter2 = clng(pCtrl.userprop.prop(101))
c##CTRLID_ALLOC_QTY##_ondataentered = g_pRRAT.allocate_qty_detail_value(nIter,nIter2,varValue) end function
'---------------------------------------------------- function c##CTRLID_ORDER_STATS##_ongetdata(pCtrl) dim nIter : nIter = clng(pCtrl.userprop.prop(100))
dim oRRI : set oRRI = g_pRRAT.m_oItemArray.Value(nIter)
pCtrl.value = cstr(oRRI.m_nPendingCount) + "/" + cstr(oRRI.m_nTotalCount)
wykresl_wiersz pCtrl.parent.parent,(oRRI.m_nPendingCount = 0) end function
'---------------------------------------------------- function wykresl_wiersz(byref pTableRow,byval bWykresl) dim pCell for each pCell in pTableRow dim pCtrl for each pCtrl in pCell if pCtrl.type = CTRL_TYPE_STATIC or pCtrl.type = CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX then #ifdef _ABAKUS if bWykresl then pCtrl.forecolor = rgb(192,192,192) else pCtrl.forecolor = rgb(0,0,0) end if #else if bWykresl then pCtrl.forecolor = rgb(0,0,0) else pCtrl.forecolor = rgb(150,150,150) end if #endif end if next next end function '---------------------------------------------------- function fill_results(byref pRRAT,byref pParamArray) dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRLID_RESULT_TABLE)) pTB.section_body.removeall
dim strSQL : strSQL = pRRAT.get_query(pParamArray.Value(0),pParamArray.Value(1),pParamArray.Value(3),pParamArray.Value(4),pParamArray.Value(5)) dim pCursor : set pCursor = trans_.createadors(strSQL) pRRAT.fill_from_query pCursor
#ifdef _ABAKUS dim nNrRecData: nNrRecData = 1 dim iter3: iter3 = 0 #endif
dim nRecNr : nRecNr = 0 dim iter for iter = 0 to pRRAT.m_oItemArray.UpperIndex dim oRRI : set oRRI = pRRAT.m_oItemArray.Value(iter) dim oOrderObj : set oOrderObj = trans_.getobj(oRRI.m_nTypeId,oRRI.m_idObj)
#ifdef _FRAM dim popKlient : popKlient = "" dim aktKlient : aktKlient = oOrderObj.pKlient.text
if iter > 0 then dim oRRI2 : set oRRI2 = pRRAT.m_oItemArray.Value(iter - 1) dim oOrderObj2 : set oOrderObj2 = trans_.getobj(oRRI2.m_nTypeId,oRRI2.m_idObj) popKlient = oOrderObj2.pKlient.text end if
if iter = 0 then '---- section klient with pTB.newrow.row .styleitem=STYLE_GROUP_HEADER set .userprop = doc_.createhli() .userprop.prop(PROPC_SECTION_START) = clng(1) .userprop.prop(PROPC_SECTION_HIDDEN) = clng(0) .userprop.prop(PROPC_SECTION_REQ) = clng(0) end with
with pTB.newcell.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE, -1).element .image = PICTURE_SMALL_MINUS .width = SIZE_FOR_PLUS .height = SIZE_FOR_PLUS .ignoresysdisable true .tip="Zwiń" set .hli= doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "section_hideshow_hli" .hli.prop(100) = clng(.ident) end with
with pTB.cell .keepline=true #ifdef _FRAM .colspan=10 #else .colspan=6 #endif end with
pTB.addtexthli aktKlient,_ doc_.createhlistr("OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE(TYPEID_N5KLIENT," + cstr(oOrderObj.pKlient.idobj) + ",USAGE_VIEW)") pTB.element.bold=true end if
if (popKlient <> aktKlient) and (iter > 0) then '---- section end klient with pTB.newrow.row .hide = true set .userprop = doc_.createhli() .userprop.prop(PROPC_SECTION_END) = clng(1) end with '-------- '---- section klient with pTB.newrow.row .styleitem=STYLE_GROUP_HEADER set .userprop = doc_.createhli() .userprop.prop(PROPC_SECTION_START) = clng(1) .userprop.prop(PROPC_SECTION_HIDDEN) = clng(0) .userprop.prop(PROPC_SECTION_REQ) = clng(0) end with
with pTB.newcell.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE, -1).element .image = PICTURE_SMALL_MINUS .width = SIZE_FOR_PLUS .height = SIZE_FOR_PLUS .ignoresysdisable true .tip="Zwiń" set .hli= doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "section_hideshow_hli" .hli.prop(100) = clng(.ident) end with
with pTB.cell .keepline=true .colspan=6 end with
pTB.addtexthli aktKlient,_ doc_.createhlistr("OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE(TYPEID_N5KLIENT," + cstr(oOrderObj.pKlient.idobj) + ",USAGE_VIEW)") pTB.element.bold=true end if #endif
#ifdef _ABAKUS if nNrRecData = 1 then 'początek sekcji with pTB.newrow.row .styleitem=STYLE_GROUP_HEADER set .userprop = doc_.createhli() .userprop.prop(PROPC_SECTION_START) = clng(1) .userprop.prop(PROPC_SECTION_HIDDEN) = clng(0) .userprop.prop(PROPC_SECTION_REQ) = clng(0) end with
with pTB.newcell.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE, -1).element .image = PICTURE_SMALL_MINUS .width = SIZE_FOR_PLUS .height = SIZE_FOR_PLUS .ignoresysdisable true .tip="Zwiń" set .hli= doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "section_hideshow_hli" .hli.prop(100) = clng(.ident) end with
with pTB.cell .keepline=true #ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL .colspan=8 #else .colspan=7 #endif end with pTB.addtext trans_.afc.display.fulldate(oRRI.m_dDataWyst) pTB.element.bold=true end if #endif
'---- section dok with pTB.newrow.row .styleitem=STYLE_GROUP_HEADER set .userprop = doc_.createhli() .userprop.prop(PROPC_SECTION_START) = clng(1) .userprop.prop(PROPC_SECTION_HIDDEN) = clng(0) .userprop.prop(PROPC_SECTION_REQ) = clng(0) end with
#ifdef _ABAKUS pTB.newcell pTB.cell.width = clng(200) #endif
with pTB.newcell.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE, -1).element .image = PICTURE_SMALL_MINUS .width = SIZE_FOR_PLUS .height = SIZE_FOR_PLUS .ignoresysdisable true .tip="Zwiń" set .hli= doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "section_hideshow_hli" .hli.prop(100) = clng(.ident) end with
with pTB.cell .keepline=true #ifdef _FRAM .colspan=1 #else .colspan=4 #endif end with dim strHeader : strHeader = oOrderObj.text pTB.addtexthli strHeader,_ doc_.createhlistr("OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE("+cstr(oRRI.m_nTypeId)+"," + cstr(oRRI.m_idObj)+",USAGE_VIEW)")
#ifdef _FRAM pTB.element.width = clng(3000) pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_STATIC , -1 with pTB.element set .userprop = doc_.createhli() .userprop.prop(100) = clng(iter) .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_ORDER_STATS) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") end with pTB.newcell.addtext GetStatus(oOrderObj) pTB.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.fulldate(oOrderObj.dDataReal) #endif
#ifndef _FRAM pTB.element.bold=true
pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BREAKLINE, -1 pTB.addtext oOrderObj.pKlient.text #endif #ifndef _FRAM pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_STATIC , -1 with pTB.element set .userprop = doc_.createhli() .userprop.prop(100) = clng(iter) .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_ORDER_STATS) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") end with #endif
#ifdef _FRAM pTB.newcell.cell.colspan=5 #endif
pTB.newcell.cell.keepline=true with pTB.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON, -1).element .bold = false .styleitem=STYLE_BUTTON .text = "Przydziel" set .hli= doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(100) = clng(iter) .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "order_allocate_products" end with with pTB.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON, -1).element .bold = false .styleitem=STYLE_BUTTON .text = "Zeruj" set .hli= doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "order_release_products" .hli.prop(100) = clng(iter) end with
with pTB.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON, -1).element .bold = false .styleitem=STYLE_BUTTON .text = "Realizuj" set .hli= doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "order_realize_products" .hli.prop(100) = clng(iter) .hli.prop(101) = oOrderObj.idobj
end with
#ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL pTB.cell.colspan=2 #endif
#ifdef _AMPLUS pTB.newcell.cell #endif
'---- details dim iter2 for iter2 = 0 to oRRI.m_oDetailArray.UpperIndex dim oRRID : set oRRID = oRRI.m_oDetailArray.Value(iter2) dim oDetailObj : set oDetailObj = oOrderObj.listPozycje.get(oRRID.m_nLP) pTB.newrow #ifdef _ABAKUS pTB.newcell pTB.cell.width = clng(200) #endif if nRecNr mod 2 = 0 then pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_ROW_EVEN end if #ifdef APPCONFIG_RAPORT_BY_PROD_INX pTB.newcell.addtext oDetailObj.pProdukt.strIndeks #else pTB.newcell.addtext oDetailObj.pProdukt.text #endif
dim strSkrot : strSkrot = oDetailObj.pOpak.pJednOpak.strSkrot dim nDokl : nDokl = oDetailObj.pOpak.pJednOpak.nDokladnosc - 1
#ifdef _FRAM pTB.cell.colspan=4 pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.quantity(GetIloscPozZlec(oOrderObj,oRRID.m_nLP),strSkrot,nDokl)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT #endif
pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.quantity(oRRID.m_curOrderQty,strSkrot,nDokl)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.quantity(oRRID.m_curPendingQty,strSkrot,nDokl)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
dim oStockInfo : set oStockInfo = pRRAT.get_stock_info(oDetailObj.pProdukt.idobj,oDetailObj.pOpak.idobj)
pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.quantity(oStockInfo.get_avail_qty(), strSkrot,nDokl)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.quantity(oStockInfo.get_reserv_qty(), strSkrot,nDokl)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
#ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL dim curKrotnosc: curKrotnosc = oDetailObj.pOpak.currKrotnosc pTB.newcell.addtext("opak.: " + doc_.afc.display.quantity(curKrotnosc, strSkrot, nDokl)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.width = clng(4000) #endif
pTB.newcell.cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_CURRENCY , -1 with pTB.element #ifndef _ABAKOSTEEL .size=13 #endif .unit = strSkrot .precision = nDokl
set .userprop = doc_.createhli() .userprop.prop(100) = clng(iter) .userprop.prop(101) = clng(iter2) #ifdef _ABAKUS .userprop.prop(103) = ccur(oStockInfo.get_avail_qty()) #endif .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_ALLOC_QTY) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") end with
#ifdef _AMPLUS pTB.newcell.cell.keepline=true with pTB.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON, -1).element .bold = false .styleitem=STYLE_BUTTON .text = "Kontrahenci" set .hli= doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(102) = clng(nRecNr) .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "show_contrahent" end with #endif
nRecNr = nRecNr + 1 next '---- section end dok with pTB.newrow.row .hide = true set .userprop = doc_.createhli() .userprop.prop(PROPC_SECTION_END) = clng(1) end with '---- ----
#ifdef _ABAKUS if nNrRecData = pRRAT.m_oItemArrayData.value(iter3) then 'konic sekcji with pTB.newrow.row .hide = true set .userprop = doc_.createhli() .userprop.prop(PROPC_SECTION_END) = clng(1) end with nNrRecData = 0 iter3 = iter3 + 1 end if nNrRecData = nNrRecData + 1 #endif
next end function
function GetStatus(byref oOrderObj): GetStatus= "" if not oOrderObj.pDokStatus is nothing then dim oDokStatus: set oDokStatus = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5DOKSTATUS,oOrderObj.pDokStatus.IdObj) GetStatus = oDokStatus.dcs_strNazwa end if end function
function GetIloscPozZlec(byref oOrderObj, byval nLP): GetIloscPozZlec = ccur(0.0) if oOrderObj.IdObj > 0 then 'znajdź zlecenie dim nIdZlec: nIdZlec = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5ZLECPROD,"pZamowienie = " + cstr(oOrderObj.IdObj)) if nIdZlec > 0 then dim oZlec: set oZlec = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5ZLECPROD,nIdZlec) dim oPoz : set oPoz = oZlec.listPozycje.get(nLP) GetIloscPozZlec = oPoz.curIloscOpakPoz end if end if end function
'funkcja wyświetla listę kontrahentów od których zakupiono produkt function show_contrahent(HLI)
dim iNrRow : iNrRow = clng(HLI.prop(102)) dim iLicz : iLicz = 0 dim iter for iter = 0 to g_pRRAT.m_oItemArray.UpperIndex dim oRRI : set oRRI = g_pRRAT.m_oItemArray.Value(iter) dim oOrderObj : set oOrderObj = trans_.getobj(oRRI.m_nTypeId,oRRI.m_idObj) dim aktKlient : aktKlient = oOrderObj.pKlient.text dim iter2 for iter2 = 0 to oRRI.m_oDetailArray.UpperIndex dim oRRID : set oRRID = oRRI.m_oDetailArray.Value(iter2) dim oDetailObj : set oDetailObj = oOrderObj.listPozycje.get(oRRID.m_nLP) if iLicz = iNrRow then dim idobj : idobj = oDetailObj.pProdukt.idobj
'wywołaj raport z parametrem idobj produktu doc_.postcommand "varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=60140 appvar_raport_type=RAPTEMPLATE_KREATOR_PRZY_TOW_KONTRAH vs110='" + CStr(idobj) + "'"
exit function end if iLicz = iLicz + 1 next next
end function
function order_realize_products(hli) dim oWizzard: set oWizzard = doc_.getpagehli("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_WIZZARD_REALIZACJA_ZAMOWIENIA appvar_mode=3 vn105=2") 'vn105 jest zmienna sterujaca kreatorem realiz. zamowienia dla obce wlasne, zmienna vn105
if oWizzard.run_external(g_pRRAT , clng(hli.prop(100)) , clng(hli.prop(101))) then page_.ctrl(hli(PROPC_CONTROL)).disable=true end if end function
#ifdef _FRAM function drukuj_do_real
dim idDPC : idDPC = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5DPC, "ePubType=" + CStr(N5DPC_PUBTYPE_INNY)) if idDPC < 1 then idDPC = fire_choice_list( TYPEID_N5DPC , "Publikacja typu 'Inny'" ,"strNazwa","pub_nInnytyp=" + CStr(N5DPC_PUBTYPE_INNY_POZYCJE_DO_REALIZAJI) ,"","" ) if idDPC = 0 then nx_.trace.fatal "FKK002","Brak publikacji typu 'Inny'" exit function end if end if
dim oHLIResult : set oHLIResult = doc_.createhli()
realize_publication idDPC,g_pRRAT,true,oHLIResult end function #endif

thead.tr:
#ifdef _ABAKUS
#endif #ifdef _FRAM
Produkt
Status
Termin realizacji
#else
Produkt
#ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL
#else
#endif #endif Ilość opakowań
#ifdef _AMPLUS
#endif

#ifdef _FRAM
w produkcji
#endif
zamówiona
pozostała
dostępna
zarezerwowana
#ifdef _ABAKOSTEEL
#else
#endif przydzielona
